title: Repository and Contracts Foundation
outcome: The repository builds from a documented environment, generated contracts are reproducible, required checks run automatically, and coding agents can execute bounded work packages.

work_packages.title: Run and repair the Rust workspace baseline
work_packages.outcome: cargo fmt, clippy and workspace tests run in the pinned toolchain and all scaffold failures are either fixed or converted into explicit work packages.

work_packages.title: Generate and validate protocol clients
work_packages.outcome: Buf lint, generation and breaking-change checks run reproducibly and generated files are verified.

work_packages.title: Establish fast required PR checks
work_packages.outcome: A pull request receives repository, Rust, TypeScript, protocol and documentation checks with a target duration under ten minutes.

work_packages.title: Add planning schema validation
work_packages.outcome: Work Packages, batches and decisions are schema-validated and checked for duplicate IDs and missing references.

work_packages.title: Generate the first test catalogue views
work_packages.outcome: Seed catalogue entries generate a readable catalogue and coverage report without manual duplication.

owner_acceptance: One documented command runs all fast verification
A failing required check blocks merge
A coding agent can load one Work Package and identify exact required tests
